recommendations.title: Mardaani
recommendations.overview: A Mumbai police officer's search for a missing teenage girl leads her to the depraved world of child trafficking. What follows is a cat-and-mouse game between the officer and a ruthless mafia kingpin.

recommendations.title: Big Bad Wolves

recommendations.title: Woman of the Hour
recommendations.overview: An aspiring actress crosses paths with a prolific serial killer in '70s LA when they're cast on an episode of "The Dating Game."

recommendations.title: Mysterious Skin
recommendations.overview: A teenage hustler and a young man obsessed with alien abductions cross paths, together discovering a horrible, liberating truth.

recommendations.title: Batman: The Long Halloween, Part One
recommendations.overview: Following a brutal series of murders taking place on Halloween, Thanksgiving, and Christmas, Gotham City's young vigilante known as the Batman sets out to pursue the mysterious serial killer alongside police officer James Gordon and district attorney

recommendations.title: The Guilty
recommendations.overview: Police officer Asger Holm, demoted to desk work as an alarm dispatcher, answers a call from a panicked woman who claims to have been kidnapped. Confined to the police station and with the phone as his only tool, Asger races against time to get help a

recommendations.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: On Stranger Tides
recommendations.overview: When Jack crosses paths with a woman from his past, he's not sure if it's love...or if she's a ruthless con artist using him to find the fabled Fountain of Youth.

recommendations.title: Under the Sea: A Descendants Story
recommendations.overview: Mal emerges from the shadows of a mystical forest onto a dark coastline where she crosses paths with Dizzy.

recommendations.title: Flashback
recommendations.overview: A female lawyer travels back in time and crosses paths with other women in history who fought for women's rights.

recommendations.title: Le Havre
recommendations.overview: In the French harbor city of Le Havre, an elderly shoeshiner with an ailing wife crosses paths with a young African refugee pursued by the police for deportation.
